name: cms-pages
title: CMS Pages
description: Shared catch-all route that renders dynamic pages from Payload CMS and/or Builder.io with automatic fallback.
docs: Shared CMS catch-all route. Checks Payload CMS first, then falls back to Builder.io. Both CMS systems coexist on the same URL space. Requires `features-config` to detect which CMS is enabled via env vars. Install `builder-io` block for Builder.io support and/or configure Payload CMS separately.
